name: Tea

unions.name: Context
unions.comment: For storing things like the logged in User, current theme, etc.

unions.name: Effects
unions.comment: Just a wrapper for effectful things

unions.name: Model
unions.comment: The overall model of your Tea app

unions.name: Msg
unions.comment: The root msg of your Tea app

unions.name: Tea
unions.comment:
Instead of dealing with `( model, Cmd msg )` we get a more robust type
that allows us to deal with other styles of effects.

aliases.name: Branch
aliases.comment: A little more than a `Browser.element` but less than a `Browser.application`
aliases.type: { init : Tea.Context flags -> Tea.Tea flags model msg effect, subscriptions : Tea.Context flags -> model -> Platform.Sub.Sub msg, update : Tea.Context flags -> msg -> model -> Tea.Tea flags model msg effect, urlChanged : Tea.Context flags -> model -> Tea.Tea flags model msg effect, view : Tea.Context flags -> model -> Html.Html msg }

aliases.name: Route
aliases.comment: A little more than a `Browser.element` but less than a `Browser.application`, and can handle URLs

aliases.name: RouteModel
aliases.comment: Helpful alias for working with routes

values.name: andThen
values.comment: Go from one Tea to another, with access to the model of the first
values.type: (model1 -> Tea.Tea flags model2 msg effects) -> Tea.Tea flags model1 msg effects -> Tea.Tea flags model2 msg effects

values.name: applyEffects
values.comment:
Convert the effects of a child into something concrete,
or maybe wrap them in your own effect to pass further upwards
values.type: (childEffect -> Tea.Tea flags model msg parentEffect -> Tea.Tea flags model msg parentEffect) -> Tea.Tea flags model msg childEffect -> Tea.Tea flags model msg parentEffect

values.name: branch
values.comment: Create a branch of your Tea app that can handle URLs
values.type: { path : List.List String.String } -> Tea.Branch flags model msg effect -> Tea.Route flags model msg effect

values.name: extractModel
values.comment: Useful for when you have multiple child components
values.type: Tea.Tea flags model msg effect -> ( model, Tea.Effects msg effect )

values.name: flags
values.comment: Get the flags out of the context

values.name: mapModel
values.comment: Map over the model of your Tea
values.type: (model1 -> model2) -> Tea.Tea flags model1 msg effect -> Tea.Tea flags model2 msg effect

values.name: mapMsg
values.comment: Map over the msg of your Tea
values.type: (msg1 -> msg2) -> Tea.Tea flags model msg1 effect -> Tea.Tea flags model msg2 effect

values.name: navigate
values.type: String.String -> Tea.Tea flags model msg effect -> Tea.Tea flags model msg effect

values.name: plant
values.comment: Converting your Tea app into a `Browser.application`. Also a play on words, like Tea, cause this is experimental
values.type: { decodeFlags : encodedFlags -> flags, root : Tea.Branch flags model msg effect, rootEffect : effect -> model -> ( model, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg ) } -> { init : encodedFlags -> Url.Url -> Browser.Navigation.Key -> ( Tea.Model model flags, Platform.Cmd.Cmd (Tea.Msg msg) ), subscriptions : Tea.Model model flags -> Platform.Sub.Sub (Tea.Msg msg), update : Tea.Msg msg -> Tea.Model model flags -> ( Tea.Model model flags, Platform.Cmd.Cmd (Tea.Msg msg) ), view : Tea.Model model flags -> Browser.Document (Tea.Msg msg), onUrlRequest : Browser.UrlRequest -> Tea.Msg msg, onUrlChange : Url.Url -> Tea.Msg msg }

values.name: relativePath
values.comment:
Get the portion of the URL path that is available to this branch,
i.e. hasn't been consumed by parent components

values.name: save
values.comment: Save the state of your model
values.type: model -> Tea.Tea flags model msg effect

values.name: setFlags
values.comment: Used to update the flags in your Tea
values.type: flags -> Tea.Tea flags model msg effect -> Tea.Tea flags model msg effect

values.name: withChildEffects
values.type: (childMsg -> parentMsg) -> (childEffect -> Tea.Tea flags model parentMsg parentEffect -> Tea.Tea flags model parentMsg parentEffect) -> Tea.Effects childMsg childEffect -> Tea.Tea flags model parentMsg parentEffect -> Tea.Tea flags model parentMsg parentEffect

values.name: withCmd
values.comment: Add a Cmd to your Tea
values.type: Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg -> Tea.Tea flags model msg effect -> Tea.Tea flags model msg effect

values.name: withEffect
values.comment: Add an effect to your Tea, to be handled by the parent component
values.type: effect -> Tea.Tea flags model msg effect -> Tea.Tea flags model msg effect

values.name: withMsg
values.comment: Add a Msg to your Tea, to be handled in a future update
values.type: msg -> Tea.Tea flags model msg effect -> Tea.Tea flags model msg effect
